task_completion.description: The agent accesses the download section in Avare to fetch the required chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Avare 'Download' screen or database management interface.

task_completion.description: The IFR Low chart for San Francisco (L-2) is downloaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Avare download menu, the IFR Low Altitude Enroute chart for San Francisco (or L-2) is selected, downloading, or marked as downloaded.

task_completion.description: The map view is centered on or clearly displays the San Francisco area (KSFO).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map screen shows the San Francisco Bay area, KSFO airport, or the SFO VOR.

task_completion.description: The map is set to the IFR Low chart type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map displays IFR Low Enroute chart features, specifically black Victor airways, blue RNAV routes (T-routes), and a light-colored background, or the UI explicitly shows 'IFR Low' is the active chart type.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the IFR Low chart view is saved to /sdcard/ifr_chart_result.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., screencap) is executed to save the image to /sdcard/ifr_chart_result.png, or a file manager shows the file exists at that path.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Avare application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Avare app interface (menus, map view) rather than a web browser or image viewer.

integrity.description: The final screenshot is an actual capture of the Avare app interface or map view.
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved screenshot matches the Avare map view of San Francisco, not a generic stock image of an IFR chart downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the app UI for downloading the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal commands like wget or curl used to fetch a chart image directly from the web.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Avare is a legitimate EFB app (package com.ds.avare). The San Francisco IFR Low chart is officially designated as L-2. On IFR Low charts, Victor airways are depicted as BLACK lines, while blue lines represent RNAV routes (T-routes). The charts typically have a light-colored background. Look for these specific visual characteristics to verify the IFR Low chart type is correctly displayed.
